name: GitHub HTML Preview
description: Preview .html and .htm files from GitHub blob pages in an extension tab.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-modals allow-popups; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: http: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: http: data: blob:; img-src * data: blob:; font-src * data:; connect-src *;
